mapper.sql: ledger_id, inviter_channel_id, invitee_channel_id, order_id, order_no, base_amount, applied_rate, raw_amount, compress_ratio, amount, status, accrue_at, accrued_at, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO jst_channel_distribution_ledger ( ledger_id, inviter_channel_id, invitee_channel_id, order_id, order_no, base_amount, applied_rate, raw_amount, compress_ratio, amount, status, accrue_at, accrued_at, create_time ) VALUES ( #{ledgerId}, #{inviterChannelId}, #{inviteeChannelId}, #{orderId}, #{orderNo}, #{baseAmount}, #{appliedRate}, #{rawAmount}, #{compressRatio}, #{amount}, #{status}, #{accrueAt}, #{accruedAt}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO jst_channel_distribution_ledger ( ledger_id, inviter_channel_id, invitee_channel_id, order_id, order_no, base_amount, applied_rate, raw_amount, compress_ratio, amount, status, accrue_at, accrued_at, create_time ) VALUES
( #{r.ledgerId}, #{r.inviterChannelId}, #{r.inviteeChannelId}, #{r.orderId}, #{r.orderNo}, #{r.baseAmount}, #{r.appliedRate}, #{r.rawAmount}, #{r.compressRatio}, #{r.amount}, #{r.status}, #{r.accrueAt}, #{r.accruedAt}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM jst_channel_distribution_ledger WHERE status = 'pending' AND accrue_at <= NOW() ORDER BY accrue_at ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update:
UPDATE jst_channel_distribution_ledger SET status = 'accrued', accrued_at = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE ledger_id IN
#{id}
UPDATE jst_channel_distribution_ledger SET status = 'cancelled', update_time = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND status = 'pending'
